# Versitale

> Versitale builds, hosts, and optimizes websites for businesses in Aruba. We provide a "Website as a Service" (WaaS) model so businesses can get a high-performing website without the massive upfront costs.

## Core Value Proposition
- **Turnkey Websites**: We handle exactly everything from design, development, and high-speed hosting to security and SEO.
- **Subscription Model**: Clients pay a flat monthly fee with zero long-term contracts. This covers creation, unlimited updates, premium hosting, and ongoing local SEO.
- **Focus on the Aruba Market**: We specifically target search optimization so our clients capture tourist and local search traffic effectively.

## Services Included
- Custom web design perfectly adapted for mobile and desktop screens.
- Local SEO and Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
- Complete technical maintenance (SSL certificates, server patching, fast loading speeds).
- Unlimited content updates upon request.
